maintainer.name: f0xx / community
maintainer.description: Unofficial. No Gentoo project QA. Prefer GitHub issues/PRs.

use.flag: Install udev rules, ACPI/sleep hooks, and OpenRC hotkey / lid services
Build and install out-of-tree hid-asus.ko plus OpenRC boot sideload (UX8406 docked keyboard)
UX5400 ScreenPad CLI, udev rules, and OpenRC/systemd units
